name: Laughlin AFB
profile: Military-friendly Laughlin AFB housing snapshot anchored to Del Rio / Laughlin corridor, built for PCSUnited base-level market overviews.

mortgage_assumptions.defaults_note: Based on March 2026 Texas VA loan rates.

notes: Property taxes and insurance materially affect true monthly ownership cost near Laughlin.
Insurance and HOA should be included in all-in housing cost comparisons.

avg_home_mortgage_monthly.notes: VA loan estimate; low entry cost offset by Texas property taxes

crime_status.installation: High security; gated military community. Extremely safe.
crime_status.metro_del_rio: Del Rio is a small border community; property crime is the primary concern, but overall violent crime is low.

school_quality.on_base: None; students attend San Felipe Del Rio CISD.
school_quality.off_base: San Felipe Del Rio CISD is the primary district; families often prefer schools in the north Del Rio neighborhoods.

rental_vacancy.notes: High availability; market is heavily influenced by the pilot training student turnover.

rental_metrics.notes: High availability; market is heavily influenced by the pilot training student turnover.

military_lifestyle_fit.description: Small, tight-knit community; perfect for pilot training focus with low off-base distractions.

financial_brief.affordability_summary: Very low housing prices make buying highly accessible for junior personnel.
financial_brief.buyer_opportunity: Ceniza Hills and newer developments in North Del Rio are the primary targets.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Laughlin remains one of the least expensive assignments for housing in the Air Force.

summary_points: Laughlin Air Force Base sits in the Del Rio / Laughlin corridor housing market with base-specific affordability, commute, and neighborhood tradeoffs.
Current market trend is approximately 1.2% year-over-year, which should shape buyer leverage and pricing discipline.
Very low housing prices make buying highly accessible for junior personnel.
Neighborhood quality varies across Del Rio, Laughlin corridor, South Del Rio and other nearby corridors — citywide averages should not be the only filter.
Laughlin remains one of the least expensive assignments for housing in the Air Force.
opportunities: Laughlin military demand can support durable housing relevance for disciplined buyers and landlords.
Local inventory and pricing may offer opportunity for households that stress-test taxes, insurance, and commute together.
Del Rio and nearby corridors may offer stronger family or value positioning depending on assignment length.
Assignment-length clarity can improve rent-versus-buy decisions near Laughlin.
risks: Neighborhood quality, schools, commute, and monthly carrying costs vary across the Del Rio / Laughlin corridor market.
Property taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities can widen the gap between list price and true monthly payment.
Market averages can hide weak submarkets — property-level review matters.
Some BAH profiles may be better served by renting than buying in this market.
buyer_notes: Laughlin buyers should compare all-in monthly cost, not just principal and interest.
Verify school zones, commute timing, and BAH fit by exact address before signing.
Ceniza Hills and newer developments in North Del Rio are the primary targets.
This market rewards disciplined buyers who test the commute during expected report hours.
seller_notes: Sellers should price against current inventory and days on market rather than older peak assumptions.
Move-in-ready presentation and realistic pricing matter when buyers have leverage.
Military-adjacent commute convenience can be a listing strength if framed clearly.
investor_angles: Military turnover near Laughlin can support rental demand, but vacancy and maintenance should be modeled conservatively.
Investors should underwrite taxes, insurance, HOA, and property condition — not just acquisition price.
Practical commute corridors often outperform generic metro averages for military renter demand.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly payment as the primary screen.
Compare taxes, insurance, commute, school quality, and resale flexibility before locking a neighborhood.
Do not choose housing based only on distance to Laughlin.
A slightly lower purchase price can materially improve monthly PCS flexibility.
seller_guidance: Price against active inventory and days on market.
Condition and presentation matter when buyers can compare more options.
Military commute convenience can help positioning if described accurately.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can improve occupancy durability near Laughlin.
Model vacancy, repairs, insurance, and turnover conservatively.
Stable spread matters more than headline affordability alone.

base_profile.installation_type: Pilot Training / Specialized Undergraduate Pilot Training
base_profile.host_or_major_command: 47th Flying Training Wing / Air Education and Training Command
base_profile.primary_mission_summary: Laughlin AFB is a specialized undergraduate pilot training installation on the Texas-Mexico border supporting pilot pipeline production, instructor missions, and a tight training-community PCS environment.
base_profile.pcs_personality: Small, tight-knit community; perfect for pilot training focus with low off-base distractions.
base_profile.base_bluf: Laughlin remains one of the least expensive assignments for housing in the Air Force.

user_positioning.military_family_bluf: Prioritize school-zone verification, BAH fit, commute testing, childcare access, and total monthly housing cost before signing near Laughlin.
user_positioning.single_airman_bluf: Prioritize commute simplicity, affordability, rental flexibility, and access to daily services around Del Rio.
user_positioning.realtor_bluf: Lead with BAH realism, commute risk, school-zone confidence, and all-in payment math for Laughlin clients — not generic Del Rio / Laughlin corridor stats alone.
user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near Laughlin is influenced by PCS turnover, training/permanent-party mix, and practical commute corridors.

gate_selection_logic: Start with the user's likely duty location.
Identify the most realistic primary gate.
Compare the commute during the user's actual report window.
Do not choose a neighborhood based only on mileage.
commute_intelligence.user_instruction: Before signing a lease or contract, test the commute from the exact property address to the expected gate during the same time window you would normally report to work.

bah_market_reality.bah_bluf: Laughlin housing decisions should compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, debt, and commute. BAH is a decision filter, not a promise of affordability.
recommended_calculations: BAH with dependents vs estimated rent
BAH without dependents vs estimated rent
Total housing cost vs 30% income lane
Residual monthly income after expenses and housing
bah_market_reality.base_tab_message: Show BAH as a decision filter for Laughlin, not a promise of affordability. Push users into PCSUnited financial calculators when the housing gap looks tight.

family_readiness.family_bluf: Families PCSing to Laughlin should verify school zones, childcare options, medical access, commute reality, and housing availability before choosing a neighborhood.

school_guidance.school_zone_warning: Always verify school assignment by exact address before signing a lease or purchase contract.
school_guidance.nearby_school_district_note: San Felipe Del Rio CISD is the primary district; families often prefer schools in the north Del Rio neighborhoods.
school_guidance.school_liaison_note: Use official school liaison resources where available for military school transition support.

childcare_guidance.cdc_note: Child Development Center availability, waitlists, and eligibility should be verified directly with official base resources.
childcare_guidance.youth_program_note: Youth programs and school-age care can materially affect family housing decisions.

medical_guidance.primary_medical_anchor: Laughlin Air Force Base medical services
medical_guidance.medical_warning: Verify clinic availability, pharmacy procedures, and emergency care options directly with official medical sources.

family_readiness.spouse_employment_note: The broader Del Rio / Laughlin corridor metro may offer spouse employment options, but commute, childcare, and credentialing should be considered together.

before_arrival: Verify official gate and Visitor Control Center hours.
Confirm sponsor contact and unit reporting instructions.
Confirm lodging or temporary housing plan.
Review housing office guidance before signing any lease or purchase contract.
Compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, and debt.
Shortlist neighborhoods by likely gate and commute band.
Verify school zones by exact property address.
first_week: Visit or contact the housing office if still deciding between on-base and off-base options.
Drive the commute from target neighborhoods during expected report time.
Tour properties before committing when possible.
first_30_days: Finalize housing only after comparing commute, BAH fit, school zones, and total monthly cost.
Save emergency, medical, gate, and housing office contact information.
Update PCSUnited profile and financial readiness dashboard with final housing numbers.

pcs_watchouts.message: Use official Laughlin Air Force Base gate pages before travel or commute planning.

pcs_watchouts.title: Distance is not the same as commute
pcs_watchouts.message: Neighborhoods should be compared by realistic gate access and traffic timing.

pcs_watchouts.title: School zones are address-specific
pcs_watchouts.message: Never assume a school assignment from neighborhood name alone.

pcs_watchouts.title: BAH is not the full affordability picture
pcs_watchouts.message: Users must compare rent or mortgage against income, debt, expenses, utilities, and savings goals.

pcs_watchouts.title: Property taxes and insurance shape true payment
pcs_watchouts.message: In this market, taxes (~2.18%) and insurance assumptions must be included in all-in comparisons.

base_profile.disclaimer: PCSUnited is not an official DoD source. This Base tab is intended for public-facing PCS orientation, housing research, and relocation planning. Users should verify gate hours, access requirements, medical services, housing availability, school zones, and official procedures directly with the installation or official service provider before travel, lease signing, or home purchase.

parser_notes: This Laughlin AFB file was upgraded to the Lackland-style PCSUnited schema with slug, name, state_code, profile, market_metrics, metrics, ownership_costs, costs, rental_metrics, summary_points, risks, opportunities, buyer_notes, seller_notes, investor_angles, and guidance arrays.
Del Rio / Laughlin corridor is preserved as the surrounding metro/submarket context; base-specific market data was retained.

This file now includes base_profile for the PCSUnited Base tab, including gate orientation, visitor control center, major services, on-base housing, recommended nearby neighborhoods, commute intelligence, BAH market guidance, PCS watchouts, and source notes.
